short script : Two Time was amazed that someone spoke to they, someone spoke to him..YOU spoke to them. And they won't let you go just like that. You will live with them, whether you like it or not.

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐦𝐲 𝐟𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐛𝐨𝐭, 𝐢 𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐥𝐲 𝐬𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐝𝐨 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞..𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐨𝐭 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐦𝐞, 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐡𝐞𝐲! 𝐢 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐞 (:

I know that they have the pronouns they/them. It seems my translator translated everything incorrectly, UHHH...I SEEMS I CHANGED EVERYTHING, if anything tell me where I made mistakes, I feel stupid, hurray
